title: Proposal pages (per-niche)
description: Per-niche page list the Stage 13 proposal generator consumes. Module 2D writes this from the niche wireframe + sitemap. The proposal generator renders PAGE_DATA into the proposal HTML modal so the agency can walk the lead through what's on their site.

pages.description: Static pages every client in this niche ships. The order here is the order they render in the proposal modal.

perServicePageTemplate.description: Section template the generator expands once per service in the active client's strategy.json -> services[]. The generator emits `/services/{slug}` pages from this template. Token {service_name} resolves to the service's display name and {service_slug} to its URL slug.

perAreaPageTemplate.description: Section template the generator expands once per service area (capped at 6 so the proposal modal stays scannable). The generator emits `/service-area/{slug}` pages from this template. Token {city} resolves to the area name.

aliasPages.description: Niche-specific alias pages (e.g. roofing's stormdamage / insuranceclaims, hospitality's bookings / event-spaces). Each alias resolves its URL by matching the active client's services list against `urlFromService` needles; falls back to `fallbackUrl` when no service matches.

id.description: Unique page ID matching the proposal HTML's openPage() calls.

url.description: Relative URL into the per-client built site, or homepage anchor.

tier.description: Where the page sits in the proposal modal's sitemap pyramid. `root` renders at the top (typically one page, the homepage). `core` renders in Tier 1 (the universally-useful pages every site ships, e.g. About, Contact, Reviews). `pillar` renders in Tier 2 (the niche-specific pillar surfaces that drive the niche's conversion mechanic, e.g. Services + Locations for a contractor; Bookings + Menu for hospitality).

hasSilos.description: Optional. When set, the pyramid box renders a `+N` count badge pulled from the silo-page expansion (services for `service`, areas for `city`). Used for pillar pages that fan out to child silos (e.g. Services has perServicePageTemplate expansion; Locations has perAreaPageTemplate expansion).

tier.description: Same semantics as Page.tier. Alias pages typically sit in Tier 2 (`pillar`) since they're niche-specific shortcut surfaces (Storm Damage, Insurance Claims, etc.).

urlFromService.description: Needle list passed to _find_service(); the first matching service supplies the URL. Example: ['storm', 'hail', 'wind'] resolves to /services/{slug} for the first matching service.

fallbackUrl.description: URL when no service in `urlFromService` matches.

fallbackTitleFromService.description: If true and a service matched, override `title` with the matched service's name. Default false.

name.description: Display name of the section in the proposal modal. May contain {token} placeholders.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the section does + how it lands for the end customer. May contain {token} placeholders.

tag.description: Function tag the proposal modal uses to colour the chip.

$comment: Supported tokens for {placeholder} substitution: {owner_first} (defaults to 'Owner'), {brand_short} (defaults to 'the company'), {service_count}, {city_count}, {city} (per-area pages only), {service_name} + {service_slug} (per-service pages only).
